subcodes.first_line: Pay no heed to those who claim knowledge unto themselves, nor let the grandeur of their turbans inspire you with fear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان لا تعتنوا الذین یدعون العلم فی انفسهم و لا یخافنکم کبر عمائمهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
